   "reasoning": "I'm sick of empty promises, so I'm only backing interventions that put money directly in students' pockets or hire more staff to actually support us. Scholarships and funding boosts are the bare minimum to keep me and others like me from dropping out. Attendance mandates and counseling programs just feel like more ways to guilt trip us for not being able to afford school.",
